web.hint: external pages use your browser adapter (tab/system/native). hosaka:// and panel routes stay inside this panel.
web.blockedHint: this target must open through external/native browser mode.
web.internalPageHint: this is internal app content. open the panel directly when needed.
web.homeBody: internal targets render here. external URLs launch through the active browser adapter.
web.iframeHelpBody: some sites (github, youtube, etc.) set X-Frame-Options and refuse to render inside other pages. this panel is running in web-fallback mode — for a true in-panel browser, enable a native-webview or remote-browser adapter.
web.openTabTitle: open in a new window (not kiosk-friendly)

books.heading: books
books.sub: search amazon books. browse here, buy there.
books.placeholder: search for a title, author, or ISBN…
books.idle: search for a book to begin.
books.noResults: no results. the signal was quiet.
books.unconfigured: the book relay isn't wired up yet.
books.unconfiguredHint: to enable: add AMAZON_PA_ACCESS_KEY, AMAZON_PA_SECRET_KEY, AMAZON_PA_PARTNER_TAG, and AMAZON_PA_REGION to your deployment environment, then redeploy.
books.unconfiguredFallback: in the meantime, try the web panel → amazon, or ask the orb for a recommendation.

wiki.heading: wikipedia roulette
wiki.sub: a random article from the long quiet. press space for another.

channel.heading: Channel
channel.desc: picoclaw is the default voice of hosaka — an agentic framework running on a tiny fly.io box, wired to gemini by a server-side key you never see. free text in the terminal goes here. the /ask command uses the gemini proxy directly for a plain one-shot question.

agent.heading: Agent backend — picoclaw
agent.desc: advanced: override the websocket url or passphrase. on the appliance build, picoclaw is connected by default with no passphrase unless you set HOSAKA_ACCESS_TOKEN on the server.
agent.passPlaceholder: the phrase the operator shared with you
agent.channelOff: closed — typing is ignored (/agent on or settings to reopen)

storage.heading: about storage
storage.geminiKey: the gemini api key lives only in vercel env vars — the browser never sees it
storage.picoclaw: picoclaw persists per-session history on the fly.io volume; your browser never sees it

appearance.heading: Appearance
appearance.desc: font size affects text panels and the terminal. takes effect immediately.

reading.errorFetch: could not reach the volume. signal was quiet.
reading.emptySelect: select a volume from the sidebar.
reading.pickDoc: select a chapter from the sidebar.

todo.heading: open loops
todo.sub: things to remember. things to close. stored in this browser only.
todo.empty: no open loops. type /todo add remember the signal in the terminal, or use the field above.

messages.heading: Messages
messages.sub: talk to the orb (offline) or to any JSON webhook you configure: discord, slack, or your own endpoint. no backend required.
messages.empty: nothing yet. say hi to the orb.
messages.storageNote: stored locally in localStorage. nothing leaves this browser except the message you send.
orbReplies: your words persist in the margins.
i hear you. the network is patient.
